review_title: I can see everything for Seo
description: I'm viewing the traffic and the number of visits to the website. I can transfer me very quickly and in real time. I would definitely recommend it to other users.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I can easily view all site traffic and site visits and I think this feature is the best
cons: Interface design and bugs can be corrected.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Detailed and powerful SEO management tool
description: A really excellent tool that predicts what you need very well. Really solid data options with strategy hints provided can help a user get to grips with a websites performance really fast.
author: Christopher C.
pros: I love how intuitive the tool is. It provides so much information on important things before you can even consider needing them. Underperforming keywords, shifts in search volume, new ranking opportunities, it's very helpful.
cons: Sometimes there is too much information. The interface is great, but it doesn't always focus your eye to the most important things, so its easy to get lost.

review_title: Great for those starting out in SEO
description: Using this software, I learnt a lot about good SEO practices and what it takes to build a sound strategy.
author: Quratulain H.
pros: This is very newbie friendly. Typically SEO software start with a $99 price tag. Not them. They charge for a minimum number of keywords and per site. Their pricing is also variable due to this. If you remove keywords you no longer wish to track it will reduce your monthly bill. They uncover the 'not-set' keywords from organic traffic which helps you see which keywords are driving traffic to your key pages.
cons: Even though its a web only interface the software is a bit slow and clunky.

description: I am using SEOmonitor to analyze our customers website and their rankings. It gives you important idea and marketing anaytics to cover all your plans for the future.
author: Mert D.
pros: SEOmonitor is helpful tool for keyword tracking to understand your website organic traffic and it's ranking. It helps you to focus on your KPI's and you can report them to your customer.
cons: SEOmonitor is expensive, you can use their alternatives but they don't give valuable features and informations that you can use for your website.

review_title: Vital for keeping track of large portfolios
author: Andrew P.
pros: Daily rank tracking across multiple regions and products and powerful customisation features provide invaluable base for reporting.
cons: Visibility metric only calculated using first 10 results

review_title: One of the best tool for SEO Professionals
description: An excellent tool for SEO Professionals, also it will give an overview of SEO campaigns and results. Based on that you can fine-tune your SEO strategies.
author: Naveen P.
pros: Here we can create smart groups by uploading keywords and later analyze them. You can also integrate Google Analytics and Search console with SEOmonitor and that is simply wonderful. Also, their Pitching feature is amazing. It will also help you in the research part just check with the forecasting feature before reaching a new client. You will get really good insights.
cons: It will take time to learn all the features. You should know when to use which feature for better results. Also its a bit expensive.

description: El control y la gestión de los esfuerzos invertidos en posicionamiento SEO son claramente más explotables con esta herramienta.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tiene mucho potencial está herramienta para la gestión SEO Me gusta los análisis de datos que ofrece
cons: No tengo nada en contra de este software

review_title: Most Developed Keyword Tracking Tool for Marketing
description: Customer service is perfect, they are able to give you a lesson about the section of tool, so you can understant each feature to use and how efficient they are.
author: Anil C.
pros: SEOmonitor is the best keyword tracking tool to create marketing strategy and reporting. My team is using SEOmonitor to analyze current situation of customers website and reporting it to clients.
cons: It is so expensive, so if you are working in a non-europe country, it cost you too much.
